privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real Barro Colorado Island (BCI) ecological dataset from the 'vegan' R package. R code execution confirms the data properties match the verifier's expectations: the true mean Shannon diversity is 3.821 (satisfying 3.0-5.0), and the true mean species richness is 90.78 (satisfying 60-140). A PERMANOVA test on Habitat yields a highly significant p-value of 0.001 (satisfying <0.05). Notably, achieving an NMDS stress <0.25 with k=2 on this dataset requires disabling the default data transformations (autotransform=FALSE), which yields a stress of ~0.174; using defaults results in ~0.254, which would fail the strict verifier threshold.
